description: CompositionBlack hooded reversible jacket made of an elastane blended fabric, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hoodie with drawstring, zippered front closure, patch pockets on either side of the zipper, embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chest and a ribbed hemFittingRegularWash careHand wash cold inside out with like coloursLay flat to dryReshape and warm ironDry cleanThis reversible jacket from nike is inspired by classic street style staples. The reversibel sides gives matt and sleek finishes depending on the sides exposed, while the double layered style along with the hoodie offers extra insulation during the winter months. Team this with tees and jeans.
